default.value: Analyzed terminal width constraints in frontend components. Found terminal components using fixed width/height (h-96, w-full) in Tailwind classes and inline styles. Terminal currently constrained by container padding and max-width settings. Need to expand to full horizontal space within frame to prevent Claude CLI cascading.

CRITICAL FINDINGS: 1) WebSocket handler processes each message ONCE via triggerHandlers 2) setOutput concatenates to existing content 3) MessageList calls parseTerminalOutput on EVERY render 4) parseTerminalOutput splits entire output into sections EACH TIME

ROOT CAUSE FOUND! MessageList.tsx Line 135: parseTerminalOutput(output, instanceId) called on EVERY render. Since output is cumulative string, parser creates ALL messages from scratch each time, causing exponential duplication!
FIX STRATEGY: 1) Memoize parseTerminalOutput with useMemo 2) Only reparse when output changes 3) Track last processed length to avoid full reparse 4) Add React.memo for MessageBubble components

Found critical MentionInput.tsx issues: findMentionQuery function at line 59-119 with @ symbol detection logic, state management with isDropdownOpen/mentionQuery state, async suggestion loading with complex fallback chains, over-complex debugging and error handling
